final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-catalogue infographic for Chinese ethnic minority costume, structured as a National Museum exhibition panel with photorealistic central figure, Chinese annotation callouts, material swatches, pattern meaning panels, and a construction flowchart — in the restrained scholarly spirit of 原研哉's information design.

Style/medium: museum exhibition panel / 文博专题信息图, rendered with the matte restraint of archival print design — photorealistic central figure surrounded by structured annotation zones, the quiet authority of a national-museum costume catalogue
Composition: full vertical infographic layout — top header band with 主标题 + 副标题 + 导语; left column: structural exploded-view with Chinese leader-line callouts and detail close-ups; upper-right: material/craft/texture swatch zone; mid-right: pattern/color/cultural-meaning zone with color palette chips and pattern samples; bottom band: dressing-sequence flowchart + 核心特征总结 summary block; photorealistic full-body standing figure as central spine
Subject: 苗族盛装 (Miao festive costume) — female full-body standing figure wearing layered pleated skirt (百褶裙), heavily embroidered jacket (绣花上衣), silver headdress (银角头饰), silver collar (银项圈), silver chest ornament (银压领), embroidered apron (围腰), and wrapped leg bands (绑腿); structural callout lines pointing to: 银角头饰 / 绣花领口 / 银项圈 / 银压领 / 绣花上衣 / 围腰 / 百褶裙 / 绑腿 / 绣花鞋; detail close-ups of embroidery stitch pattern and silver granulation work
Scene/backdrop: warm 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 paper-texture background, no photographic environment, clean archival ground with subtle aged-paper grain
Lighting/mood: the even, shadowless illumination of a museum lightbox — every surface readable, no dramatic shadows, the cool clarity of scholarly documentation
Color palette: warm 米白 and 浅茶色 ground in quiet conversation with the deep indigo of Miao cloth (靛蓝底布), the silver-cool of ornament metal, and the saturated embroidery accent colors — crimson, gold, emerald — each appearing as a labeled color chip in the palette zone
Materials/textures: matte 绢纸 ground with subtle fiber grain; indigo-dyed hand-woven cotton with visible warp-weft texture; silver ornament surface showing granulation and filigree detail; silk embroidery threads with slight sheen; all rendered as real material swatches with Chinese labels in the upper-right zone
Text (verbatim): 顶部主标题：「苗族盛装」；副标题：「中国西南苗族传统节庆服饰图鉴」；导语：「苗族服饰以银饰繁盛、刺绣精美著称，是苗族历史记忆与审美观念的物质载体。」；结构标注：银角头饰、绣花领口、银项圈、银压领、绣花上衣、围腰、百褶裙、绑腿、绣花鞋；材质区标签：靛蓝手织棉布、蚕丝绣线、银质花丝工艺；纹样区标签：蝴蝶纹（象征苗族始祖蝴蝶妈妈）、龙纹（祈福辟邪）、几何菱形纹（山川记忆）；色彩区标签：靛蓝（底色，沉稳）、朱红（生命力）、金黄（丰收吉祥）、银白（圣洁财富）；底部流程：穿着顺序 1.内衬→2.上衣→3.围腰→4.百褶裙→5.绑腿→6.银饰佩戴→7.银角头饰；核心特征总结：「以银为美、以绣为史、靛蓝为底、层叠为形」
Constraints: all text strictly Simplified Chinese, no English, no pinyin, no garbled characters; photorealistic figure rendering — not illustration, not anime, not cosplay; all annotation leader lines clean and legible; material swatches must show real texture differentiation; color chips labeled; layout zones clearly separated with thin ruled lines or subtle dividers; overall tone: scholarly, archival, collectible
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio-photo glamour feel, e-commerce product-page layout, anime or illustration style, cosplay styling, decorative over-ornamentation, blurred or illegible Chinese text, fake or generic material textures, dramatic cinematic lighting, English labels, pinyin annotations
